01_nahw_simple.title: أخبار أبي القاسم الزجاجي
01_nahw_simple.notes: Literary compilation (أمالي/أخبار tradition). Classified under أدب by al-Warraq and islamicbook.ws. Shamela category النحو والصرف is author-driven, not content-based. Classical primary from Shamela → verified. No muhaqiq noted in metadata but does not trigger flag.

02_nahw_muhaqiq.title: أبنية الأسماء والأفعال والمصادر
02_nahw_muhaqiq.notes: Classical sarf reference. Has muhaqiq (أحمد محمد عبد الدايم) — not in recognized list but presence noted. Classical primary → verified.

03_fiqh.title: أحكام الاضطباع والرمل في الطواف
03_fiqh.notes: Modern risalah, contemporary author, published in university journal.

04_hadith.title: جزء فيه من أحاديث الإمام أيوب السختياني
04_hadith.notes: Classical hadith juz. Has muhaqiq (د سليمان العريني) — not in recognized list but presence noted. Classical primary → verified.

05_tafsir.title: أنوار الهلالين في التعقبات على الجلالين
05_tafsir.notes: Modern تعقبات (critical corrections) on Tafsir al-Jalalayn. 56 pages. Not a sharh (does not explain) or hashiyah (does not supplement). Standalone critical work organized by مباحث, not verse order. Quotes al-Jalalayn in citation style, not interleaved layers. Should have genre_chain with responds_to relation to Tafsir al-Jalalayn.

06_usul.title: آداب الفتوى والمفتي والمستفتي
06_usul.notes: النووي is one of the most recognized scholars. Muhaqiq present, دار الفكر publisher.

07_balagha.title: أساليب بلاغية
07_balagha.notes: Modern university textbook (محاضرات) for first-year Arabic students. By Prof. Ahmad Matloub, Baghdad University. Not a matn (no sharh/hashiyah ecosystem). Not a risalah (comprehensive textbook, not focused treatise).

08_death_date.title: آداب الصحبة
08_death_date.notes: Classical Sufi adab work. Has muhaqiq (مجدي فتحي السيد) — not in recognized list but presence noted. Classical primary → verified.

09_alt_title.title: أسلوب خطبة الجمعة
09_alt_title.author_identified: عبد الله بن ضيف الله الرحيلي
09_alt_title.notes: Academic paper by a university professor, published in government religious affairs journal. Not beginner-level material.

10_no_author.title: البدر التمام بما صح من أدلة الأحكام
10_no_author.author_identified: ناصر بن سعيد بن سيف السيف
10_no_author.notes: Modern compilation of Bukhari/Muslim hadith organized by fiqh chapters (أحاديث الأحكام sub-genre, modeled on بلوغ المرام). Content is hadith texts, organizing principle is fiqh topics. Both sciences apply.

11_multi_small.title: همع الهوامع في شرح جمع الجوامع
11_multi_small.notes: Major grammar sharh. 3 volumes. Multi-layer: sharh on جمع الجوامع.

12_multi_muq.title: مذكرات مالك بن نبي - العفن
12_multi_muq.notes: Autobiography/memoirs of Algerian intellectual Malek Bennabi. Originally French (Pourritures), translated to Arabic. Personal narrative, not Islamic scholarship. level=null means classification inapplicable.

alfiyyah_versified.title: متن الفية ابن مالك فى علم النحو والصرف
alfiyyah_versified.notes: Plain text file. Most famous Arabic grammar poem. 1002 verses.
